policy: Keep tasks small enough for one Codex patch. Split ambiguous tasks before implementation.

done.title: Add observation-box edge hide toggle
done.summary: Added a mobile HIDE toggle beside CITY that hides the camera-nearest vertical edge of the enclosing observation box without disabling CITY scenery.

done.title: Prevent Grand Sphere multi-shot crash
done.summary: Changed mobile COUNT and salvo scheduling guards so Grand Sphere is replaced by the normal default firework whenever the selected count leaves one.

done.title: Tune Grand Sphere density and Height levels
done.summary: Increased Grand Sphere particle density and changed Height variation to deterministic three-level elevated burst heights that also apply to single launches.

done.title: Add single-launch grand sphere firework
done.summary: Added Grand Sphere as a large 3D spherical single-launch firework selectable from the mobile MENU with COUNT forced to 1, while keeping it out of multi-shot salvos.

done.title: Expose inward pair salvo in mobile count controls
done.summary: Added COUNT 6 to the mobile MENU salvo selector and allowed COUNT RND/random-count salvo mode to select the inward mirrored pair pattern.

done.title: Add inward mirrored pair salvo pattern
done.summary: Added keyboard 6 as a persistent mirrored inward pair salvo: 10 horizontal launch positions fire as five simultaneous left/right pairs from the outside toward the center.

done.title: Remove Safari audio unlock workarounds
done.summary: Removed the first-touch BGM retry and public HTML WebAudio unlock helper after confirming the iPhone no-audio issue was Silent Mode.

done.title: Keep mobile random type separate from random count
done.summary: Kept the current mobile COUNT choice, including COUNT RND, when enabling mobile random firework type mode so type randomization and count randomization stay independent.

done.title: Install Safari WebAudio unlock in public HTML
done.summary: Extended the public Pyxel Web HTML patcher to inject a Safari-friendly WebAudio unlock helper before launchPyxel.

done.title: Retry audio startup after mobile touch
done.summary: Retried BGM startup on the first mobile touch input so Safari can unlock audio after a user gesture.

done.title: Disable Pyxel Web virtual gamepad
done.summary: Added a release helper to disable Pyxel Web's default virtual d-pad/buttons so phones use the in-app mobile panel instead.

done.title: Connect mobile auto launch to selected count
done.summary: Fixed mobile AUTO so automatic launches use the selected COUNT value instead of forcing one-shell launches.

done.title: Connect mobile count selector to salvo state
done.summary: Fixed the mobile COUNT selector so it updates runtime salvo count state and SALVO START uses the selected count.

done.title: Show current firework kind on mobile selector
done.summary: Replaced the small NEXT label with a wider mobile firework selector labeled by the currently selected kind.

done.title: Add mobile salvo count selector
done.summary: Moved BGM beside audio and added a top COUNT selector cycling 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, and RND, with SALVO START using the selected count.

done.title: Compact mobile panel height
done.summary: Shortened the mobile control panel and aligned ZOOM+, ZOOM-, and CLOSE as equal-width bottom-row buttons so more of the scene remains visible.

done.title: Add PC mouse-wheel zoom
done.summary: Added mouse-wheel zoom for PC users using the same camera zoom bounds as keyboard and touch zoom controls.

done.title: Make mobile panel instant and add BGM toggle
done.summary: Changed mobile panel checkbox rows to apply immediately, removed the APPLY step, and added a BGM-only toggle that leaves explosion SFX available when overall audio is on.

done.title: Add mobile touch control panel
done.summary: Added drag/flick camera rotation and a top-right mobile control panel with larger text, checkbox controls, and touch zoom buttons for touch-friendly runtime control.

done.title: Scrub local absolute paths and add privacy checks
done.summary: Removed tracked local absolute paths and local machine references, added a tracked-file public safety checker, and wired it into scripts/check_all.py.

done.title: Add Japanese README
done.summary: Added README.ja.md as a natural Japanese public README, linked it from README.md, and added a public release checklist.

done.title: Tune Long Willow long trail decay
done.summary: Added Long Willow-only long branch trail history of about 56 frames with sparse broken rear decay and gentler long-branch fall speed while preserving baseline Willow, shell tail, global glitter, and palette variant behavior.

done.title: Add per-burst color palette variants
done.summary: Added three deterministic color palette variants per firework kind, selected by launch seed, with delayed mini-burst garnish inheriting the selected parent palette.

done.title: Add smile firework preset
done.summary: Added Smile as a shaped firework preset with eye clusters and a smiling mouth arc, included it in cycle/random/salvo selection, and kept delayed mini-burst garnish disabled for Smile readability.

done.title: Add delayed mini-burst garnish
done.summary: Added optional deterministic delayed mini-burst garnish for Kiku, Sphere Bloom, Peony, and Multi-ring, spawning 2 to 5 small staggered child blooms near eligible parent bursts without adding a new main firework kind.

done.title: Tune UFO visibility and Long Willow trail mixture
done.summary: Modestly increased UFO wireframe size, added deterministic low/middle/high UFO height bands, and tuned Long Willow to mix longer-trail falling branches with trail-light and no-trail falling embers.

done.title: Replace UFO sprite with 3D wireframe saucer
done.summary: Replaced the UFO's flat sprite-like drawing with a small 3D wireframe saucer while preserving rare scheduling, U toggle behavior, silence, no-beam/no-trail/no-particle constraints, and all firework/CITY/audio behavior.

done.title: Add required sphere and willow firework variants
done.summary: Added Sphere Bloom as the explicit canonical sphere-like firework and Long Willow as the explicit longer falling willow variant while preserving existing Kiku, Peony, and Willow behavior.

done.title: Add rare UFO ambient flyby to official runtime
done.summary: Added a rare silent official-runtime UFO ambient flyby with deterministic Pyxel-independent scheduling/path helpers, Pyxel-bound rendering, and U toggle while preserving fireworks, CITY, stars, audio, shell tail, and glitter.

done.title: Tune BGM support rhythm and lower overall volume
done.summary: Lowered runtime BGM volume and changed channel 2 into sparse mid-register rhythmic support so explosion SFX remains the primary audio subject.

done.title: Rebuild BGM as simple chord harmony
done.summary: Rebuilt runtime BGM from arpeggio/shimmer counter-lines into aligned melody, harmony, and soft support channels with a clear large/medium/small volume hierarchy.

done.title: Add BGM harmony and extend loop length
done.summary: Extended runtime BGM into a longer three-channel music-box arrangement while keeping channel 3 reserved for explosion SFX.

done.title: Add runtime audio scaffold with music-box BGM and explosion SFX
done.summary: Added official runtime audio with quiet music-box BGM, low restrained explosion SFX, burst SFX cooldown, and M mute toggle while preserving visual behavior.

done.title: Make main.py a robust simple launcher
done.summary: Made python main.py, python3 main.py, and pyxel run main.py first-class launch paths by keeping main.py as a thin src-bootstrap launcher and normalizing Pyxel wrapper argv in the runtime CLI.

done.title: Convert main.py to official runtime launcher
done.summary: Converted main.py from the old standalone prototype into a thin launcher that delegates to the official package runtime app.

done.title: Runtime parity review and main.py handoff decision
done.summary: Recorded manual preview/runtime parity review as OK and marked main.py handoff readiness as READY for a separate thin-launcher task.

done.title: Add first official runtime app and entrypoint
done.summary: Added the first package-side official runtime app, Pyxel input/render/effects boundaries, and a separate launcher without touching protected main.py or importing from the preview tool.

done.title: Extract show launch and salvo scheduling
done.summary: Moved single launch, fixed salvo, random-count salvo, random firework kind, and height variation schedule construction into Pyxel-independent runtime helpers, with preview consuming immutable launch schedules.

done.title: Extract camera motion and auto-rotate comfort settings
done.summary: Moved settled auto-rotate speed and pitch sway comfort settings into Pyxel-independent runtime camera motion helpers, and updated the preview to consume them without changing behavior.

done.title: Extract preview runtime state/controller scaffold
done.summary: Added Pyxel-independent package-side runtime state and show-controller scaffolding for first-generation preview-equivalent modes and toggles without changing preview behavior.

done.title: Preview-to-runtime integration contract
done.summary: Documented the contract for promoting first-generation preview behavior into package runtime while keeping main.py protected and preserving the preview as a development harness.

done.title: Initialize docs from project brief
done.summary: Created project_brief.json from the template example and generated the initial product docs, goal state, roadmap, and task queue.

done.title: Review external firework reference files
done.summary: Reviewed the external Firework.py as reference material only and documented adaptable burst ideas, coordinate risks, trail risks, and suggested preset candidates in docs/research/external_firework_reference.md.

done.title: Verify package imports and tests
done.summary: Set up local validation tools and verified package import, compile, pytest, ruff, uv, and check_all status. pyxel, pytest, ruff, and uv are installed; compileall, pytest, ruff, and check_all pass.

done.title: Document screen profiles and in-box scenery architecture
done.summary: Completed as a documentation-only planning task. Added screen profile strategy, in-box 3D scenery architecture, future task ordering, and the requirement that scenery must not be a 2D screen-space background.

done.title: Reconcile standalone prototype with package architecture
done.summary: Inspected protected standalone main.py, documented its Camera3D, box, rocket, particle, trail, render, and UI behavior, and mapped a staged package migration strategy in docs/architecture/PROTOTYPE_RECONCILIATION.md.

done.title: Add screen profile configuration scaffold
done.summary: Added package-side ScreenProfile configuration data with classic as the default profile and iphone16_balanced and iphone16_large as selectable data.

done.title: Add package-side Camera3D and projection scaffold
done.summary: Added Pyxel-independent Camera3D projection scaffold using ScreenProfile values and tests for y-up projection, profile-dependent centers, depth guard, determinism, and smoothing.

done.title: Add package-side wire box scaffold
done.summary: Added Pyxel-independent WireBox geometry scaffold using ScreenProfile box dimensions and Camera3D projection, with tests for dimensions, vertices, edges, centering, edge groups, and deterministic projected edges.

done.title: Establish firework preset scaffold
done.summary: Added Pyxel-independent firework preset scaffold with FireworkKind, FireworkShape, TrailPreset, SecondaryPreset, and FireworkPreset data types.

done.title: Implement deterministic radial / kiku preset
done.summary: Added KIKU_PRESET and deterministic Pyxel-independent spherical burst generation that returns ParticleSpawnSpec values with partial trail data.

done.title: Implement ring preset
done.summary: Added RING_PRESET and deterministic Pyxel-independent ring burst generation with mostly planar velocities, small z thickness, and partial trail data.

done.title: Add manual Pyxel preview for Kiku and Ring bursts
done.summary: Added a manual tools/preview_firework_box.py Pyxel preview harness for visually inspecting package-side Camera3D, WireBox, Kiku, and Ring burst behavior before Spiral work.

done.title: Tune iPhone screen profiles to portrait firework volume
done.summary: Adjusted iPhone-style profiles so the internal observation box becomes a tall portrait firework volume.

done.title: Tune iPhone screen profiles to portrait Pyxel viewport
done.summary: Changed iPhone-style Pyxel screen profiles from landscape to portrait while preserving the tall firework volume and classic default.

done.title: Add deterministic Ring orientation bank
done.summary: Added Pyxel-independent RingOrientation and RingOrientationBank support with stratified deterministic orientations, and connected the manual preview to use a 24-orientation bank for Ring bursts.

done.title: Implement spiral preset
done.summary: Added SPIRAL_PRESET and deterministic Pyxel-independent 3D spiral burst generation, and extended the manual preview to cycle Kiku, Ring, and Spiral.

done.title: Implement willow preset
done.summary: Added WILLOW_PRESET and deterministic Pyxel-independent willow burst generation with stronger negative gravity, longer partial trails, and manual preview cycling.

done.title: Implement peony preset
done.summary: Added PEONY_PRESET and deterministic Pyxel-independent peony burst generation with short life, bright palette, restrained trails, and manual preview cycling.

done.title: Add random burst selection mode to preview
done.summary: Added preview-only random burst selection mode with R to enter random mode, SPACE to return to sequential mode, and deterministic random choices for manual and auto launches.

done.title: Add fixed-position salvo launch plans to preview
done.summary: Added Pyxel-independent fixed-position salvo plans and preview number-key scheduling for 1 through 5 profile-scaled burst launches.

done.title: Implement multi-ring preset
done.summary: Added MULTI_RING_PRESET and deterministic Pyxel-independent three-layer multi-ring burst generation, with preview random and salvo support.

done.title: Implement senrin / secondary burst preset
done.summary: Added SENRIN_PRESET, deterministic primary seed generation, optional SecondaryBurstSpec data, deterministic secondary burst generation, and preview-only secondary execution.

done.title: Add persistent preview salvo controls
done.summary: Changed preview number keys into persistent salvo loops, added 0 as random-count salvo mode, added H height variation, and drew preview-only launch-to-burst rocket trajectories.

done.title: Fix preview rocket tail, flight pacing, and launch speed variation
done.summary: Changed preview rockets to launch before bursting, draw only short recent-motion tails, use longer distance-aware flight times, and vary launch speeds per rocket.

done.title: Add preset cycling and visual tuning checklist
done.summary: Added docs/research/visual_tuning_checklist.md to define profile targets, preview commands, controls, per-preset visual checks, stress sequences, density risks, and follow-up tuning candidates.

done.title: Review external Firework.py for future preset candidates
done.summary: Reviewed external Firework.py as reference material only and documented future preset candidates, 3D translation strategy, risks, and recommended order in docs/research/external_firework_candidates_20260625.md.

done.title: Add type-colored rocket tails and burst accent rays
done.summary: Added preview-only burst-type rocket tail colors and short-lived center-outward accent rays for selected explosion particles without changing pure generation or production runtime behavior.

done.title: Restore simple gradient firework shell tail
done.summary: Restored the preview rising launch visual to a shared firework shell tail using a short white/yellow/brown gradient and removed type-specific shell tail geometry.

done.title: Add preview scenery preset scaffold and switching
done.summary: Added Pyxel-independent in-box 3D scenery preset data for EMPTY, MOUNTAINS, CITY, and RIVERBANK, plus preview G cycling and B visibility toggle.

done.title: Refocus scenery to city-only 3D urban kit
done.summary: Refocused active preview scenery to EMPTY and CITY, and rebuilt CITY as profile-scaled 3D cuboid building blocks with sparse lit windows.

done.title: Ground city building wireframes
done.summary: Omitted CITY building bottom-face perimeter edges while keeping vertical and top edges, and slightly reduced current city block scale and height so buildings read as rising from the cut floor plane.

done.title: Add subtle burst radius variation
done.summary: Added bounded deterministic per-particle velocity magnitude wobble to pure burst generation so explosion radii feel less mechanically uniform while preserving preset identities.

done.title: Add city landmark, utility poles, and wires
done.summary: Added CITY-only low-detail 3D urban details: a landmark tower, utility poles, and sagging overhead wire polylines, while keeping scenery Pyxel-independent and subordinate to fireworks.

done.title: Implement Halo preset
done.summary: Added HALO_PRESET and deterministic Pyxel-independent Halo burst generation as a light, soft, wobbling ring-like firework, with preview sequential, random, and salvo support.

done.title: Densify city blocks and replace utility poles with signage
done.summary: Refined active CITY into a denser cutaway urban mass with more grounded building blocks, a larger grounded landmark tower, removed utility poles/wires, and low-detail building signage.

done.title: Add preview auto-rotation speed cycling
done.summary: Added preview-only Q control to cycle auto-rotation speed through slow, normal, and fast while preserving X as auto-rotate ON/OFF.

done.title: Add ferris wheel and full-footprint city coverage
done.summary: Expanded active CITY building coverage across the lower observation-box footprint and added one low-detail ferris wheel while preserving preview controls and firework behavior.

done.title: Add interior twinkling box stars with toggle
done.summary: Added preview-only twinkling stars attached to the observation box's interior top and upper side faces, with T toggling and conservative interior-face visibility.

done.title: Tune burst compactness and city landmark layout
done.summary: Tightened deterministic burst radius wobble, enlarged the CITY ferris wheel, and preserved a central boulevard-like open corridor through the dense city footprint.

done.title: Tune preview auto rotate comfort
done.summary: Reduced preview auto-rotate normal and fast speeds and scaled vertical sway by speed mode while preserving X and Q controls.

done.title: Tune ceiling stars, glitter residue, ferris wheel roundness, and city edge coverage
done.summary: Relaxed top-face star visibility while preserving side-wall thresholds, added sparse preview-only glitter residue, rounded the CITY ferris wheel, and added peripheral CITY buildings while preserving the central boulevard.

done.title: Relax ceiling star shallow-angle visibility
done.summary: Relaxed only the top-face interior star visibility threshold further so ceiling stars remain visible at smaller eye-line-to-ceiling angles, while side-wall star visibility remains unchanged.

done.title: Balance city building outline brightness
done.summary: Changed CITY building cuboid outlines to an even, interleaved bright-blue/dark-blue distribution while leaving the tower, ferris wheel, signs, windows, and geometry unchanged.

done.title: Increase city building count to 48
done.summary: Increased active CITY building cuboids to 48 while preserving the balanced bright-blue/dark-blue distribution, central boulevard, and existing tower, ferris wheel, signage, and window behavior.

done.title: Reduce burst radius maximum width
done.summary: Scaled primary burst velocity radius to 80% of the previous maximum while preserving deterministic wobble, trail tendencies, preset constants, Senrin secondary, CITY, and preview controls.

done.title: Keep ceiling stars visible at near-parallel angles
done.summary: Widened only the top-face interior star visibility threshold so ceiling stars remain visible at near-parallel eye-line-to-ceiling angles while side-wall visibility remains unchanged.
